## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant demo or fixture command:

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or `.env` files were added or modified.
- [ ] No tests, linting, type checks, or security checks were disabled.
- [ ] The patch is minimal and scoped to the issue.
- [ ] Any AI-generated changes were reviewed by a human.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed.

## Screenshots or Logs

Paste sanitized output only.
